title: NLU intent → graph traversal entry
description: For each predicted intent (Phase 2 benchmark / API predicted_intent), defines how Phase 4 GraphRAG picks **entry nodes**. `cypher_template` rows are **parameterized** starters only — compose follow-on Cypher in code with the same safety rules as Step 11.
parameter_safety: Bind only allowlisted parameters from `entry.parameters` or from kg_nlu_entity_map_lib resolvers; never splice raw user text into Cypher.

expansion_hints: From Relief, consider inbound COVERS_RELIEF from Section for statutory wording.
Combine with top-k TextChunk anchors from retrieval if Relief node absent.
intents.notes: Seed `relief_id` values must match graph `Relief` nodes.

expansion_hints: Link to approved-charity Concept nodes when NER provides entity resolution.
intents.notes: Align `relief_id` with curated Relief + Concept seeds.

intents.description: Tax residence, days tests, scope of Sri Lanka taxation.
expansion_hints: From Concept, follow DEFINES inbound from Section; add Lex edges for overrides.
intents.notes: `tax_resident` concept_id should match Concept seeds (see concepts_seed.json style).

intents.description: Unknown or low-confidence intent — anchor on law-grounded chunks.
expansion_hints: MATCH (t:TextChunk) WHERE t.chunk_id IN $chunk_ids RETURN t — bind chunk_ids from retrieval only.
intents.notes: Optionally ask a disambiguation question when intent probability is below a product threshold.
